summary: Iteration 2 verification for Spelman Blueprint Spotlight Award Guidebook. Backend pytest suite (14 tests) all pass — rubric 1-5 scale (5 criteria, total 25), tracking (Accepted/Waitlist/Rejected/Disqualified + Jane Doe on selection; N/A + Jane Doe on production), photos seed >=3 with admin-guarded CRUD, contacts seed with founder Kelsie Tillage + 3 co-chairs with admin-guarded CRUD, nomination has Nominator Information section with anonymity choice + social handles question, themes descriptions mention 'intentional' + 18/1881, auth guards enforced. Frontend: Home mission quote, Nav paw-print logo image + rebrand text, Themes page shows per-year photo gallery, Rubric shows 1–5 scale and total 25, Tracking shows Interview Recording Policy note (Zoom + voice audio), Contacts shows Kelsie Tillage card + 3 co-chair cards. Admin panel has all 8 tabs (winners/themes/timelines/nomination/rubric/tracking/photos/contacts); Photo add + delete verified end-to-end (POST 200, list grew from 3→4, DELETE 200); Contact add + delete verified end-to-end (POST 200, DELETE 200).
critical_code_review_comments: Tracking.jsx: both TabsContent (selection and production) render the same `rows` variable (already filtered by tab). Not a bug because filtering runs on tab change, but the duplicated content blocks are redundant — could be replaced by a single TabsContent that reacts to `tab`.

Admin.jsx GenericAdmin uses shadcn <Label> without htmlFor so Playwright/screen-reader `get_by_label` cannot map to the input. Recommend adding htmlFor+id (or wrapping input inside the label) for accessibility and testability.
server.py CORS middleware is added AFTER app.include_router. FastAPI still applies it because middleware is registered on the app, but by convention CORS should be added before include_router.

Contacts.jsx uses `data.find` on the founder by regex on role, then filters `chairs = data.filter((c) => c !== creator)`. Reference equality works with SWR cache but is brittle if data is re-mapped — safer to filter by id.
seed_data_creation: None persisted — all TEST_ photos/contacts created during Playwright/pytest runs were deleted in the same run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All new endpoints (/api/photos, /api/contacts) support admin-guarded CRUD and are covered. Nomination/themes/tracking/rubric assertions match the seed_data.py v3 payloads. Admin panel GenericAdmin form inputs do NOT have label htmlFor, so Playwright get_by_label won't resolve — target the 'Add new' card's inputs by nth() as shown in this iteration's script. Verify integration success via network logs + delete-button count (not innerText, since values live in <input value>).
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in this iteration.
